_comment: Wang Family Village — Wang Lin's Childhood Home structure definition. Per PROJECT_MASTER.md §5.1-5.2, Wang Lin's pre-massacre childhood home is a modest ruined dwelling with a hidden compartment containing early cultivation notes ('Notes on Qi Gathering — Wang Lin's Early Scribbles'). Standalone jigsaw structure spawning in ergenverse:zhao_plains biome. Size 4 (small home). NBT composition to be authored in-game; placeholder location references data/ergenverse/structures/wang_family_village/wang_lin_childhood_home.nbt.
